channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Geno Auriemma and Chris Dailey on the cusp of an NCAA record for victories at storied UConn
item.description: STORRS, Conn. (AP) — Rebecca Lobo still has the handwritten letters she received from UConn coaches Geno Auriemma and Chris Dailey 35 years ago when they were recruiting her as one of the top high school players in the country.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rafael Nadal loses at the Davis Cup in what could be his last match
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal bit his lower lip and his eyes scanned the stands as he stood alongside his Davis Cup teammates for Spain's national anthem Tuesday before what he — and everyone — knew might be the last match of his career, a 6-4, 6-4 loss to Botic van de Zandschulp of
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Rafael Nadal could be headed to retirement after losing opening match at the Davis Cup
item.description: MALAGA, Spain (AP) — Rafael Nadal lost 6-4, 6-4 to Botic van de Zandschulp in the Davis Cup on Tuesday in what may have been the last match of the Spaniard's career.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Shaun White's new halfpipe league to air on NBC, Peacock
item.description: The new action-sports league being launched by Shaun White will air on NBC and stream on Peacock beginning next year. White announced earlier this year that he was putting together The Snow League, a four-stop circuit that will feature halfpipe snowboarding and freeskiing.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ex-NBA stars Carter, McGrady part of group seeking to buy stake in Buffalo Bills, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — Former NBA stars Vince Carter and Tracy McGrady are part of a group being considered by the NFL to purchase a non-controlling minority stake in the Buffalo Bills, a person with knowledge of the league finance committee’s agenda told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah State women's volleyball star applauds school as it seeks to be added to Mountain West lawsuit
item.description: Utah State women's volleyball star Kylie Ray applauded her school as it sought to enter as a plaintiff in a lawsuit against the Mountain West Conference.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Analysis: Some NBA teams know it's time to shake out of early-season slides — or else
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Postgame interviews in the NBA typically start about 10 minutes after the final buzzer. Coaches usually speak first, followed by a few players. When a team wins, most people are in a great mood. When a team loses, not so much. That's the normal routine.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pirates phenom Paul Skenes wins NL Rookie of the Year after dominant start to MLB career
item.description: Pittsburgh Pirates phenom pitcher Paul Skenes was named NL Rookie of the Year after an incredible start to his MLB career, posting a 1.96 ERA over 23 starts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: SJSU volleyball captain demands removal of transgender athlete
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (KRON) -- Some San Jose State University women's volleyball players are suing their head coach, their university, and the Division-1 Mountain West Conference for allowing a transgender player to be on the team.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Roy High to play for first state title since 1981
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Roy High football team will play for its first state championship in 43 years. Roy defeated defending 5A champion Timpview on Friday, 29-19 to advance to next week's title game at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WGN 9

item.title: Former Sky coach Teresa Weatherspoon hired for new Unrivaled 3-on-3 basketball league
item.description: The total salary pool for the 36 players is more than $8 million, with players receiving equity in the league.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Corner Canyon beats Lehi in OT to advance to 6A title game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Corner Canyon is headed back to the 6A championship game, after a 35-34 overtime thriller over Lehi Thursday at Rice-Eccles Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs TE Cade Otton emerging as reliable target for Baker Mayfield in absence of injured receivers
item.description: Cade Otton is showing the rest of the NFL the type of offensive weapon the Tampa Bay Buccaneers always felt he could become.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Rays' principal owner, said in an interview that Steinbrenner Field in Tampa is the best fit for the team.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Finally healthy, Puka Nacua poised for strong finish
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Puka Nacua was not supposed to be this good, this quickly. As a fifth round draft pick out of BYU by the L.A. Rams in 2023, Nacua took the NFL by storm, setting rookie records with 104 catches for 1,486 yards.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Report: Chicago Bears reconsider old Michael Reese Hospital site as new stadium location
item.description: Chicago Bears are reconsidering the Michael Reese Hospital site as a possible location for a new stadium, as they seek larger private investment and political support for the project.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utes quarterback Brandon Rose out for the season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a year that has been devasted by season-ending injuries, the Utes football team has suffered another one. After making his first career start, quarterback Brandon Rose has been lost for the year after suffering a lower leg injury in Saturday's 22-21 loss to BYU.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU ranked 6th in College Football Playoff poll
item.description: PROVO, Utah (AB4 Sports) - It was one of the most thrilling victories in BYU history, and will go down as a true rivalry classic. But perhaps what was even more thrilling for the Cougars than their 22-21 win over Utah Saturday night, was the reception they received late Saturday night in Provo.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Interim Oakland Roots head coach gets promoted
item.description: (KRON) – Oakland Roots Soccer Club Interim Head Coach Gavin Glinton can finally ditch the “interim” of his title. The soccer club announced that Glinton has been promoted to full-time Head Coach ahead of the 2025 United Soccer League Championship season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Dodgers fan claims he was fired for calling in sick, attending World Series parade
item.description: People are willing to go to great lengths to support their beloved sports teams—one person even lost his job for it. A Los Angeles Dodgers fan claims he was fired after being spotted at the team's World Series victory parade after calling in sick for work.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5
